zh.lifeSummary: 當Llewelyn ap Hywel於1330年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾帕可萊迪斯時，他的父親Hywel Fychan ap Hywel17歲，母親Alys verch Llewelyn29歲。他於1345年與Maud verch Ieuan在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾布雷可諾可結婚。他們至少是18個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1412年6月1日在威爾士蒙姆爾享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llewelyn ap Hywel于1330年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾帕可萊迪斯时，他的父亲Hywel Fychan ap Hywel17岁，母亲Alys verch Llewelyn29岁。他于1345年与Maud verch Ieuan在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾布雷可諾可结婚。他们至少是18个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1412年6月1日在威尔士蒙姆爾享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: When Llewelyn ap Hywel was born in 1330, in Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, was 17 and his mother, Alys verch Llewelyn, was 29. He married Maud verch Ieuan in 1345, in Brecknock, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 18 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 1 June 1412, in Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llewelyn ap Hywel est né en 1330, à Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Alys verch Llewelyn, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Maud verch Ieuan en 1345, à Brecknock, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 18 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1412, à Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.Lngtwgdyfrynwysg, Abergavennym, Monmouth: Llangattocknigh Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Llewelyn ap Hywel 1330 in Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel Fychan ap Hywel 17 und seine Mutter Alys verch Llewelyn 29. Er hat 1345 in Brecknock, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom Maud verch Ieuan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 18 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juni 1412 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Monmouthshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Hywel è nato il nel 1330 nel Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Alys verch Llewelyn, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Maud verch Ieuan nel 1345, nel Brecknock, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 18 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1412, nel Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywelが1330年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアパークレティスで生まれた時，父Hywel Fychan ap Hywelは17歳，母Alys verch Llewelynは29歳であった。1345年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアブレクノックでMaud verch Ieuanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも18人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年6月1日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel(이)가 1330년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 파르클티스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel Fychan ap Hywel(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Alys verch Llewelyn(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1345년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레c노크에서 Maud verch Ieuan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년 6월 1일 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Lngtwgdyfrynwysg, Abergavennym, Monmouth: Llangattocknigh Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Hywel nasceu em 1330, em Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Alys verch Llewelyn, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud verch Ieuan em 1345, em Brecknock, Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 18 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1412, em Monmouthshire, Gales, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llewelyn ap Hywel родился в 1330 г. в местности парклетис, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Hywel Fychan ap Hywel было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Alys verch Llewelyn, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud verch Ieuan в 1345 г. в местности бреккнокк, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 18 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 1 июня 1412 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 82 лет.

es.Lngtwgdyfrynwysg, Abergavennym, Monmouth: Llangattocknigh Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llewelyn ap Hywel nació en 1330, en Parcletis, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Alys verch Llewelyn, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Maud verch Ieuan en 1345, en Brecknock, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 18 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1412, en Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 82 años.
